rationale: The main alert (A0) indicates the creation of a scheduled task named '\npcapwatchdog' which executes 'C:\Program Files\Npcap\CheckStatus.bat'. Npcap is a legitimate network packet capture library. The other evidence items (EV-001, EV-002, EV-003) show scheduled tasks for Firefox and Aurora Agent, which are also legitimate software. All observed activities appear to be related to the installation or maintenance of standard software.
